title: Microstructures morphology - Ophiuroidea
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"31q0n","text":"Study of the microstructure morphology, particularly arm ossicles of ophiuroids. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"17u8s","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Extract from a small part of the proximal arm, between the fifth and the tenth segment.
Immerse the arm segment in regular household bleach (NaClO) until the soft tissues be removed.
The ossicles have to be washed with distilled water, air-dried, and prepared for examination with a SEM model JEOL JSM5800LV
creator: Renata Alitto
